search_terms_used: foam rolling running performance recovery systematic review meta-analysis
stretching running injury prevention systematic review
myofascial release running recovery performance PubMed
mobility running performance dynamic stretching warm-up systematic review PubMed
foam rolling delayed onset muscle soreness runners recovery randomized controlled trial
coverage_notes: Strong coverage of foam rolling (2 meta-analyses, 1 systematic review, 1 RCT) and stretching (1 systematic review on injury, 1 systematic review on performance/ROM/injury, 1 meta-analysis on stretching and running economy). Running-specific populations represented in Craib 1996 (sub-elite runners), Sulowska-Daszyk 2022 (recreational long-distance runners), Konrad 2021 (scoping review on running), and Warneke 2025 (running economy meta-analysis). General athletic populations in foam rolling reviews. Gap: no dedicated RCT of dynamic stretching warm-up in runners specifically, though Behm 2016 and Konrad 2021 cover this indirectly.

papers.title: A Meta-Analysis of the Effects of Foam Rolling on Performance and Recovery
papers.notes: Meta-analysis examining pre-exercise and post-exercise foam rolling effects on sprint, jump, strength performance, flexibility, and muscle pain.

papers.title: A systematic review and meta-analysis of the effects of foam rolling on range of motion, recovery and markers of athletic performance
papers.journal: Journal of Bodywork and Movement Therapies
papers.notes: Systematic review and meta-analysis of foam rolling effects on ROM, recovery markers, and athletic performance across multiple sports.

papers.title: The Effects of Self-Myofascial Release Using a Foam Roll or Roller Massager on Joint Range of Motion, Muscle Recovery, and Performance: A Systematic Review
papers.journal: International Journal of Sports Physical Therapy
papers.notes: Systematic review of 14 studies examining self-myofascial release via foam roll or roller massager on ROM, muscle recovery, and performance.

papers.title: Foam Rolling for Delayed-Onset Muscle Soreness and Recovery of Dynamic Performance Measures
papers.notes: RCT examining foam rolling effects on DOMS, pressure-pain threshold, sprint speed, power, and dynamic strength-endurance after muscle-damaging exercise.

papers.title: The Influence of Self-Myofascial Release on Muscle Flexibility in Long-Distance Runners
papers.journal: International Journal of Environmental Research and Public Health
papers.notes: RCT examining acute effects of self-myofascial release on muscle flexibility in 62 recreational long-distance runners.

papers.title: Acute effects of muscle stretching on physical performance, range of motion, and injury incidence in healthy active individuals: a systematic review
papers.notes: Systematic review comparing acute effects of static, dynamic, and PNF stretching on performance, ROM, and injury incidence in active individuals.

papers.title: Acute and Chronic Effects of Stretching on Running Economy: A Systematic Review with Meta-Analysis
papers.notes: Systematic review and meta-analysis of 15 acute and 2 chronic studies examining effects of static, dynamic, and PNF stretching on running economy.

papers.title: The association between flexibility and running economy in sub-elite male distance runners
papers.notes: Cross-sectional study examining the association between lower-body flexibility measures and running economy in 19 sub-elite male distance runners.
